excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE outperforms RoPE on hardware
supported: matched no-hardware packet freeze for five two-qubit positional-score encoding families
identical row sets within each source lane across PhaseWrap, RoPE-like, sinusoidal-like, ALIBI-like, and no-position/control encodings
a fixed-width product-state score readout template for future noisy-hardware execution planning

objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.

packets.claim_boundary: Matched fixed-width score-encoding packet; supports future noisy-hardware comparison setup only, not a hardware robustness result.

matching_policy.depth_family: two single-qubit RY preparations plus computational-basis measurement
matching_policy.hardware_scope: packet freeze only; not hardware evidence
matching_policy.row_set: identical source rows across encoding families within each lane
